claims.summary: Recovery, stable-core retirement, semantic projection, sensory input, and shadow observation are distinct runtime mechanisms.
claims.disposition: verify their source ownership and separately rendered evidence

claims.summary: A stable recovery floor or thin semantic lane does not alone establish the source of felt viscosity.
claims.disposition: verify the provenance-separated observation and causal limits

claims.summary: Entropy-sensitive spread relief and density-gradient recovery need counterfactual evidence.
claims.disposition: route a bounded deterministic recovery comparison without active-runtime wiring

claims.summary: Changing recovery fill boost, semantic retirement, or spread relief alters live Minime substrate behavior.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait
